column1: 2Empty Net Performance stats for NHL teams

On this page you can see the success of teams when a net is empty. The stats are for regular season, for playoffs or for the playing year in total. Statistics are available for the teams with the empty net or against it ever since the players on ice were recorded for goals: 1999 and later. The statistics for 1999 might be incomplete.
